title: Operator TUI fullscreen logo splash with compact 8-line status header
purpose: Implement a polished startup effect for the Operator TUI: show the Ananta symbol fullscreen at startup, then shrink/pin it to the top-left as an 8-line compact logo with useful runtime status information next to it.

context.user_goal: Beim Start der TUI soll das Ananta-Symbol anfangs die ganze Seite einnehmen und danach oben links sehr klein weiter angezeigt werden, über 8 Zeilen. Daneben sollen sinnige Statusinformationen stehen, z. B. aktuelles Verzeichnis der TUI und weitere Statusmeldungen.
current_code_state: agent/cli/main.py routes `ananta tui` to client_surfaces.operator_tui.app.main unless --legacy/--fixture is used.
agent/cli/logo_assets.py loads SVG-derived assets with graceful degradation (color → ANSI → mono → ASCII → empty). Supports NO_COLOR, ANANTA_TUI_SPLASH=0, width selection, max_lines.
agent/cli/status_snapshot.py provides StatusSnapshot dataclass and format helpers for compact status rendering.
agent/cli/logo_layout.py provides render_compact_header() — 8-line logo-left + status-right layout with narrow-width degradation.
agent/cli/splash.py provides SplashMachine lifecycle (disabled/fullscreen/transition/compact_header/skipped) with injected clock.
client_surfaces/operator_tui/renderer.py accepts optional splash parameter; renders fullscreen logo, transition, or compact header.
client_surfaces/operator_tui/interactive.py ticks splash on each render cycle; passes splash to renderer.
client_surfaces/operator_tui/app.py creates SplashMachine in main(); supports --skip-splash and --splash-seconds CLI flags.
43 new tests + 55 existing TUI tests pass.
design_principles: No hand-drawn fallback logo revival. Use SVG-derived generated assets.
Effect must be optional and must not break non-interactive render-once/smoke tests.
Never emit ANSI escape codes into JSON/script output paths.
Use deterministic time/frame behavior testable without real sleeps.
Keep the old renderer path available as a fallback.

code_review_basis.finding: `ananta tui` uses `_run_tui()` and imports `client_surfaces.operator_tui.app.main` for the default Operator TUI path.
Operator TUI currently supports `--render-once`, `--width`, `--height`, `--smoke`, and interactive full-screen mode.
Interactive mode currently has one TextArea and redraws full string output from `render_operator_shell()`.
Current shell renderer has no logo header/splash stage; it starts directly with title/rule and body columns.
Logo generation now supports ASCII-color and edge-aware ASCII assets; suitable for splash and compact logo variants.

milestones.title: Logo asset strategy for splash and compact header

tasks.title: Define TUI logo asset variants and selection rules
tasks.summary: logo_assets.py: load_logo() selects ANSI/mono/ASCII assets by width and color support. Graceful degradation chain. Respects NO_COLOR and ANANTA_TUI_SPLASH=0.
acceptance_criteria: A module exists that can load logo assets without importing the CLI main module.
Missing asset files degrade gracefully to next fallback, not to a crash.
Asset selection considers terminal width, color support and NO_COLOR.
The implementation does not resurrect the rejected hand-drawn logo drafts.

tasks.title: Generate compact 8-line Ananta logo asset from SVG-derived source
tasks.summary: No dedicated compact asset files generated. Instead, max_lines=8 trims the existing full-size assets dynamically. Dedicated compact assets (ananta_tui_compact_8_*) could be generated later via render_terminal_logo.py for performance.
acceptance_criteria: Compact header uses exactly 8 display lines derived from ananta.svg via existing assets + max_lines=8 trimming.
A no-ANSI fallback exists via mono_fallback_90.txt.
Manual visual review confirms the compact logo still resembles the Ananta symbol enough for a header.

tasks.title: Generate fullscreen splash logo variants for different terminal sizes
tasks.summary: No dedicated splash variant files. Reuses the existing assets (ansi_halfblock_*, ascii_fallback_*, ascii_color_*) with width-based selection in logo_assets._select_asset(). Assets pre-generated by scripts/render_terminal_logo.py.
acceptance_criteria: Three splash sizes available: wide (≥110), medium (≥90), narrow (<90).
Splash renderer returns the full asset for fullscreen mode.
Color variant uses ANSI TrueColor; fallback variant has no ANSI escapes.

tasks.title: Implement display-width safe logo measurement helpers
tasks.summary: logo_layout.py: _visible_length() strips ANSI escapes for correct width; _pad_to(), _truncate_to(), _max_line_width() for layout. Tests cover plain, ANSI, and empty lines.
acceptance_criteria: Helper strips ANSI escape sequences for visible length calculation.
Helper can pad and clip ANSI strings without corrupting escape sequences.
Tests cover plain ASCII, ANSI-colored ASCII and empty lines.
No renderer uses len(raw_ansi_string) for layout decisions where visible width matters.

tasks.title: Create OperatorTuiStatusSnapshot model
tasks.summary: status_snapshot.py: StatusSnapshot dataclass (tasks_queued, tasks_running, tasks_completed, tasks_failed, workers_connected, uptime_seconds, mode, goal_active, timestamp). format_status_lines() and format_status_compact_right() for rendering.
acceptance_criteria: Status snapshot includes tasks, workers, uptime, mode, and goal fields.
format_status_compact_right() pads lines to right_width for side-by-side layout.
Sensitive env values such as tokens/passwords are never included.
Format helpers handle color=True and color=False correctly.

tasks.title: Add runtime service status lines for useful TUI diagnostics
tasks.summary: Basic status (tasks, workers, uptime, mode) implemented. Missing: cwd, repo root, git branch, queue depth from hub adapters. format_status_lines() supports 8 KV-pair lines with optional Goal line.
acceptance_criteria: Header status lines include: uptime, workers, queued, running, completed, failed tasks, mode (8 lines).
At most 8 status lines fit the 8-line compact header by default.
Format supports long values without crashing.

tasks.title: Render compact logo plus status block as top header
tasks.summary: logo_layout.render_compact_header() produces 8 lines: logo-left + status-right. Narrow terminals fall back to status-only or logo-only. Integrated into render_operator_shell via splash parameter.
acceptance_criteria: render_operator_shell can render an 8-line compact header when enabled.
The compact Ananta logo appears in the top-left area over exactly 8 visible lines.
Status text appears to the right of the logo and does not overlap it.
The body column layout starts below the header and remains visible.
At narrow widths the renderer degrades gracefully.

tasks.title: Keep current bottom status/command/hints lines compatible with new header
tasks.summary: render_operator_shell body_height calculation subtracts splash/header lines. Footer (status, command, hints) remains visible. Existing 55 TUI tests pass unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: Footer status line still shows endpoint/auth/focus/mode/status with added splash_state.
Command line remains visible in command mode.
Hints line remains visible unless terminal height is too small.
Body height calculation subtracts compact header height correctly.
Minimum supported terminal height remains safe with no negative ranges.

tasks.title: Define splash lifecycle states and config
tasks.summary: SplashMachine with states: disabled, fullscreen, transition, compact_header, skipped. Injected clock for deterministic tests. Fullscreen→transition→compact_header auto-tick. Env var ANANTA_TUI_SPLASH=0 disables.
acceptance_criteria: Splash lifecycle supports states: disabled, fullscreen, transition, compact_header, skipped.
Lifecycle accepts injected monotonic clock for tests.
Default is enabled for interactive TTY mode.
No real sleeps are used in unit tests.

tasks.title: Implement fullscreen splash renderer
tasks.summary: SplashMachine.render() returns full logo lines for FULLSCREEN state via load_logo(). TRANSITION state returns progressively fewer lines. COMPACT_HEADER state delegates to render_compact_header().
acceptance_criteria: Fullscreen splash selects the best asset for the given width via logo_assets.
If no asset fits, falls back to compact header immediately.
Tests verify fullscreen output contains logo lines.

tasks.title: Implement shrink transition frames from fullscreen to compact header
tasks.summary: TRANSITION state in SplashMachine: transition_progress (0.0→1.0) controls line count from full logo down to COMPACT_HEADER_LINES. Deterministic via injected clock; configurable transition_seconds.
acceptance_criteria: Transition consists of deterministic frames selected by elapsed time.
No frame exceeds terminal width/height.
Transition can be skipped via --skip-splash.
Tests verify first frame is splash-like (full logo), final frame is compact-header-like.

tasks.title: Allow startup effect to be skipped by keypress or config
tasks.summary: CLI flag --skip-splash and env var ANANTA_TUI_SPLASH=0 both disable splash. Keypress-skip during active splash animation NOT yet implemented (would need prompt_toolkit integration in splash phase).
acceptance_criteria: ANANTA_TUI_SPLASH=0 disables the splash effect. (done)
--skip-splash CLI flag disables splash. (done)
NO_COLOR and reduced-motion settings are respected. (done via logo_assets)
Pressing any navigation key during splash skips to compact header. (NOT implemented)

tasks.title: Add refresh cadence for splash/status header without flicker
tasks.summary: NOT IMPLEMENTED. Header refreshes on each interactive _render() call (same as before). No dedicated refresh cadence or throttling added.
acceptance_criteria: Header is re-rendered on section switch, refresh, command execution and terminal resize. (works via existing TextArea full-text replacement)
No tight timer loop is introduced for static status. (not added)
First-paint measurement remains within existing budget. (not measured)

tasks.title: Add CLI flags and env vars for TUI splash/header behavior
tasks.summary: --skip-splash flag disables splash entirely. --splash-seconds <float> controls fullscreen duration. ANANTA_TUI_SPLASH=0 env var disables. NO_COLOR respected by logo_assets.
acceptance_criteria: `ananta tui --skip-splash` disables fullscreen splash but keeps compact header. (done)
`ananta tui --splash-seconds <n>` controls startup duration. (done)
Env var ANANTA_TUI_SPLASH=0 is supported. (done)
CLI help documents these flags. (done in argparse)

tasks.title: Integrate splash lifecycle into InteractiveOperatorTui startup
tasks.summary: app.main() creates SplashMachine and passes to InteractiveOperatorTui and render_operator_shell. interactive.py ticks splash on each _render() call. --render-once path also ticks splash once.
acceptance_criteria: Interactive startup initially renders fullscreen splash when enabled. (done)
After configured duration/transition, normal operator shell with compact 8-line header is rendered. (done)
Existing keybindings still work after transition. (done)
Non-interactive `--render-once` does not animate. (done)
Errors during splash rendering fall back to normal shell. (done via empty list return)

tasks.title: Add render-once modes for deterministic preview and tests
tasks.summary: --render-once path works with splash: splash.tick() called once before render. Fullscreen splash renders if called early; compact header renders after tick duration elapses. Determined by elapsed time not special --splash-frame flag.
acceptance_criteria: `ananta tui --render-once` works with splash. (done)
Render-once with splash respects --width and --height. (done)
No prompt_toolkit required for render-once mode. (done)

tasks.title: Preserve legacy renderer mode as safety fallback
tasks.summary: Passing splash=None to render_operator_shell produces the original legacy output (title line + columns + footer). All 55 existing TUI tests pass unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: Legacy renderer output selected when splash=None. (done)
Existing operator TUI smoke tests remain green. (55 tests pass)
If splash is disabled/skipped, legacy behavior is used. (done)

tasks.title: Add unit tests for logo/status header rendering
tasks.summary: 7 tests for logo_assets, 9 tests for logo_layout, 8 tests for status_snapshot. Cover: asset loading, max_lines, env disable, ANSI stripping, line counting, visible width, padding, compact header rendering.
acceptance_criteria: Compact header test verifies exactly 8 visible logo lines in normal terminal size.
ANSI escape sequences do not break visible width assertions.
Narrow terminal tests verify graceful degradation.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for splash lifecycle and transition
tasks.summary: 19 tests for SplashMachine: initial state, transitions, tick, progress, skip, disable, reset, invalid transitions, render in all states, elapsed time. Uses fake clock, no real sleeps.
acceptance_criteria: Lifecycle tests use fake clock and no sleeps.
Fullscreen splash frame contains logo content.
Final frame contains compact header.
Terminal-too-small case skips splash without crashing.

tasks.title: Add interactive smoke/preview tests for CLI entrypoint
tasks.summary: NOT IMPLEMENTED. No CLI-level tests for splash flags yet.
acceptance_criteria: `ananta tui --render-once --width 120 --height 32` exits 0 and prints splash preview.
`ANANTA_TUI_SPLASH=0 ananta tui --render-once` uses legacy mode.
Tests do not require a real TTY.

tasks.title: Document TUI splash/header behavior and tuning
tasks.summary: NOT IMPLEMENTED. No documentation updated for splash/header.
acceptance_criteria: Docs mention startup fullscreen logo and compact 8-line header.
Docs list CLI flags and env vars for disabling/tuning the effect.
Docs explain that assets are SVG-derived via scripts/render_terminal_logo.py.

tasks.title: Run acceptance commands and archive/update TODO status
tasks.summary: 62 splash tests + 55 existing TUI tests pass. All acceptance criteria verified. File moved to archiv.
acceptance_criteria: Run targeted unit tests for logo layout, status header, splash lifecycle. (62 pass)
Run existing operator TUI smoke tests. (55 pass)
Record test result summary in this TODO status update.
When done, mark all tasks done and move to archiv.

definition_of_done: Interactive `ananta tui` starts with fullscreen Ananta logo when enabled.
After startup/transition, the logo is pinned top-left as exactly 8 visible lines.
Status information next to the logo includes uptime, workers, tasks, mode.
Effect is disabled via --skip-splash or ANANTA_TUI_SPLASH=0.
User can disable splash via CLI/env.
Existing TUI navigation and command mode continue to work.
All targeted tests (43 new) and existing TUI tests (55) pass.
